title: AI helped Shenzhen judges handle cases 50% faster. Is this the future for China?
description: Pilot system driven by artificial intelligence technology will now be rolled out in the courts of dozens more Chinese cities.
content:
In a social media post on Tuesday, the Shenzhen Intermediate People’s Court said each judge in the city had handled an average of 744 cases in 2025 – up by 249 cases from the previous year.
That made Shenzhen’s judges the most efficient and productiv... [460 chars]

title: Global Markets Steady Amid Middle East Tensions and Earnings Reports
description: Global markets show resilience as investors navigate geopolitical uncertainties in the Middle East, economic data, and corporate earnings. Despite tensions, oil prices remain stable and stocks show modest gains, driven by strong corporate performance and cautious sentiment over central bank policies and artificial intelligence investment.
content: Global markets are showing resilience despite fresh uncertainties in the Middle East and upcoming corporate earnings reports. Investors are keeping a close watch on the situation in the Strait of Hormuz, where the U.S. is poised to provide naval supp... [670 chars]

title: Asian Stocks Near Record as AI Boom Helps Wipe Out War Losses
description: Asian stocks rose to near a record, with a measure excluding Japan already at an all-time high, as investors’ enthusiasm for artificial intelligence bets helped erase losses caused by the war in Iran.
content:

title: Mark Cuban Urges Employees To Challenge AI Output To Secure Job Stability, Says 'If You Regurgitate What
description: Mark Cuban told his followers on Sunday that workers should use artificial intelligence as an opponent to test and challenge, not a machine that quietly writes their work for them.
content: In his post on X, Cuban wrote that the safer career move is to engage with AI output, probe for mistakes, and learn how to explain what you found to managers and peers. He said that getting useful results requires heavy upfront work: building the rig... [2513 chars]
